title: Idle Server Shutdown
description: This plugin turns off the server if no one's playing for more than 5 minutes.
body:
**IdleServerShutdown: Auto shutdown after 5 mins of inactivity for resource efficiency.**

Make managing your server a breeze; it conveniently turns off the server if there's no players for more than 5 minutes, allowing you to conserve resources and operate your server more intelligently. Upgrade your experience with Auto Server Shutdown for a hassle-free solution.

**Features**
- Simple and user-friendly plugin designed for effortless use.
- Configurable for adjusting inactivity duration with simplicity.
- Console notifies server shutdowns and shutdown cancellations.
- Exceptionally lightweight and openly sourced for versatility.
- Save system resources by minimizing CPU and RAM usage.

**Why use this plugin?**

I personally use this plugin because I have implemented a hibernation mode for my server. If someone tries to join, the server automatically wakes up from hibernation mode and starts up. This plugin proves useful for hibernation, efficiently saving resources by turning off the server when no players are present, allowing it to return to hibernation mode.

**Support**

Come join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/vorbullmc-1081725071321739264) for a more responsive experience! Questions posted on our Discord channel receive faster responses compared to inquiries on Spigot. Join the conversation and get the support you need swiftly.

<details>
<summary>Showcase video & How to use</summary>

Contact us on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/vorbullmc-1081725071321739264) server to add your video tutorial here.

</details>
<details>
<summary>The Plugin's Default Config File</summary>

```yaml
shutdownDelay: 300 # Shutdown in seconds. (Default is 5 minutes)
```

</details>
